## 代码示例

```python
import asyncio
from py_claude_code import ChatSession, load_config

async def main():
    config = load_config()
    session = ChatSession(config)

    # 使用工具自动完成
    response = await session.send_message(
        "请查看当前目录结构并统计Python文件数量",
        use_tools=True
    )
    print(response)

asyncio.run(main())
```
